nasb.text: namely, from their descendants who were left after them in the land whom the sons of Israel had not destroyed, them Solomon raised as forced laborers to this day.

esv.text: from their descendants who were left after them in the land, whom the people of Israel had not destroyed—these Solomon drafted as forced labor, and so they are to this day.

cnv.text: 他們的子孫仍然留在那地，以色列人沒有消滅他們。於是，所羅門徵召他們作苦工，直到今日。

ccb.text: 以色列人没有灭绝他们。所罗门让他们服劳役，至今如此。
